since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +5.00%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.10% · BTC +2.22% · Gold +1.52% · Nasdaq100 -1.12%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +5.00%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +5.00%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.82%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.82%, APP +10.09%, META +9.71%, PATH +9.02%, PLTR +8.72%. Laggards: KLAC -10.76%, LRCX -10.70%, AMAT -10.40%, TER -10.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.67% at $161.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
